about.hero-description: Professional, reliable, and comfortable airport transportation service.
about.about-content: We are Fairfield Airport Car Service, your trusted partner for reliable and comfortable airport transportation. With years of experience, we understand the importance of punctuality and safety. Our professional drivers are background-checked and equipped with clean, well-maintained vehicles to ensure a smooth and enjoyable journey for you.
about.cta-description: Book your ride today and experience the difference.
about.subtitle: Welcome to the about page
about.description: Fairfield Airport Car Service is your premier choice for reliable, professional airport transportation throughout Fairfield County. We specialize in punctual, comfortable rides to and from all major airports, ensuring you arrive on time and stress-free. Our experienced, background-checked drivers operate clean, well-maintained vehicles, providing the safety and comfort you deserve. Whether you're traveling for business or pleasure, we're committed to making your journey seamless and enjoyable.
about.title: About Us
about.content-features: Our services include airport pickup and dropoff, corporate transportation, and special event shuttles.
about.content-description: We provide reliable, professional airport transportation throughout Fairfield County. Licensed driver, clean vehicle, on-time service.
about.content: We are Fairfield Airport Car Service, your trusted partner for reliable and comfortable airport transportation. With years of experience, we understand the importance of punctuality and safety. Our professional drivers are background-checked and equipped with clean, well-maintained vehicles to ensure a smooth and enjoyable journey for you.
about.meta-description: About Fairfield Airport Car Service - Learn about our reliable airport transportation service.

help.hero-description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about our service.
help.faq-items-0-question: How do I book a ride?
help.faq-items-0-answer: You can book online through our website or contact us directly.
help.faq-items-1-answer: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before pickup receive a full refund. Cancellations 3-24 hours before receive 50% refund.
help.faq-items-2-answer: Yes, we provide both airport pickup and drop-off services.
help.contact-description: Contact our support team for additional assistance.
help.title: Help & FAQs
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our service
help.sections-0-content: Learn about our booking process and policies.
help.sections-1-content: Find out which airports and areas we serve.
help.faq-0-question: How far in advance should I book?
help.faq-0-answer: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance for airport rides.
help.faq-1-answer: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before pickup receive a full refund. Cancellations 3-24 hours before receive 50% refund.
help.contact-section-description: If you can't find the answer you're looking for, please don't hesitate to reach out.

home.hero-title: Stress-Free Airport Transportation for Fairfield County
home.features-items-3-description: Service to all major airports in NY and CT area.
home.features-items-4-description: Fully insured and licensed transportation service.
home.faq-subtitle: Everything you need to know about our service
home.fleet-description: You will ride in a meticulously maintained Chevrolet Suburban or a similar full-size luxury SUV, offering ample space for passengers and luggage.
home.fleet-vehicles-0-description: Spacious Chevrolet Suburban with premium amenities including complimentary water, Wi-Fi, and phone chargers.
home.fleet-vehicles-1-description: Experienced drivers with background checks, ensuring your safety and comfort throughout your journey.
home.final-cta-subtitle: Professional airport transportation at your service
home.contact-content: Ready to book your ride? Get in touch with us today.
home.subtitle: Premium
home.description: Reliable, professional, and luxurious transportation to and from all major airports in the NY and CT
home.content-description: This content can be edited through the CMS.
home.content-sections-0-description: This is the first section of content.
home.content-sections-1-description: This is the second section of content.
home.title: Fairfield Airport Ca
home.features-items-0-description: Licensed, insured, and experienced drivers who know the area and prioritize your safety.
home.faq-items-0-question: How far in advance should I book?
home.features-subtitle: Premium service that puts you first
home.final-cta-description: Experience the difference that professional airport transportation makes. Book your ride today and travel with confidence.
home.features-items-1-description: Clean, comfortable vehicles maintained to the highest standards for your comfort.
home.features-items-2-description: Simple online booking with instant confirmation and real-time updates.
home.about-content: We provide premium airport transportation services throughout Fairfield County and the greater New York metropolitan area. Our commitment to excellence ensures every ride is comfortable, reliable, and professional.
home.faq-items-2-answer: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before your scheduled pickup time.
home.faq-items-1-answer: We serve all major airports including JFK, LGA, EWR, and local Connecticut airports.
home.faq-items-3-answer: Yes, we can provide child seats upon request. Please let us know when booking.
home.hero-description: Professional, reliable, and comfortable transportation to and from all major airports in the NY and CT area. Book your stress-free ride today.
home.faq-items-0-answer: We require booking at least 24 hours in advance, though we can sometimes accommodate same-day requests based on availability.

privacy.hero-description: Learn how we protect and handle your personal information.
privacy.privacy-content: This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.collection-content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you book a ride.
privacy.use-content: We use your information to provide our services and improve your experience.
privacy.sharing-content: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.security-content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information.
privacy.rights-content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information.
privacy.cookies-content: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience.
privacy.updates-content: We may update this policy from time to time.
privacy.contact-content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. We collect and use your data in accordance with our privacy policy. This policy outlines how we handle your personal information and data.
privacy.meta-description: Fairfield Airport Car Service Privacy Policy - Information on how we protect your personal data.

terms.contact-content: For questions about these terms, please contact us.
